docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF HARRIET STRICKLEH. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT FASTRAK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,491.95 FILED BY STRICKLEH, HARRIET AS TO DEFENDANT FASTRAK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRICKLEH, HARRIET AS TO DEFENDANT FASTRAK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (RETURN RECEIPT FOR CERTIFIED MAIL NOT SIGNED) SERVED OCT-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FASTRAK
